summary: Implemented sioyek 'w' key toggle between Gruvbox and Nord themes. Added sioyek-theme-toggle script to home.nix using writeShellScriptBin with state tracking in ~/.cache/sioyek-theme-state. Updated sioyek prefs_user.config with new_command directive and keys_user.config with toggle binding. All phases complete, home-manager switch applied successfully.

artifacts.summary: Added sioyek-theme-toggle shell script to home.packages

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented true single-key toggle between Gruvbox light and Nord dark themes in sioyek. Created sioyek-theme-toggle script with state tracking, added new_command directive to prefs_user.config, and updated keybinding. 'w' key now properly toggles between themes instead of only switching to Nord.

next_steps: Open a PDF in sioyek and press 'w' multiple times to verify toggle works in both directions
